title: Pan-Seared Octopus with German Stir Fry
description: A fusion of German and Peruvian flavors, this dish combines the tender octopus with crispy vegetables and a side of spicy stir-fry.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and fry until golden brown.
Add the chopped bell peppers and fry for 2 more minutes.
Add the octopus to the pan and sear for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the octopus to a plate and set aside.
In the same pan, add the German mustard and stir-fry sauce.
Add the crispy potatoes to the pan and stir-fry until well coated.
Return the octopus to the pan and simmer for 2 more minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately and garnish with crispy potatoes and stir-fry sauce.
